title: Miconia neoepiphyitca
taxonomy: Miconia neoepiphyitca is classified within the family Melastomataceae. This family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the melastome family. The genus Miconia is a large group of epiphytic plants, with Miconia neoepiphyitca being one of the species. Miconia neoepiphyitca is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. As a member of the family Melastomataceae, Miconia neoepiphyitca is closely related to other species within this family.

intro: Miconia neoepiphytica is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, commonly known as a member of the "merrellia" or "ochrosperma" complex, native to South America. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in reducing oxidative stress and inflammation in the body.
